Mtn To Compel Further Response To Req For Production Of Docs, To Compel Verification To Req For Production Of Docs
Off Calendar Nov-03-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF KERRY SHAPIRO'S Motion To Compel Further Response To Request For Production Of Documents, To Compel Verification To Request For Production Of Documents and Privelege Log is granted.
